channel.title: The River Church | Post Falls, Idaho
channel.description: If you're looking for a church to call home we believe you will find a place to belong at The River Church! Follow along as we preach through the Word of God in Post Falls, Idaho. Learn more at theriverag.church
channel.itunes:summary: If you're looking for a church to call home we believe you will find a place to belong at The River Church! Follow along as we preach through the Word of God in Post Falls, Idaho. Learn more at theriverag.church
channel.itunes:author: theriverag.church

item.title: Maybe Yes, Maybe No: Empowered, Not Enabled — Acts 12
item.description: Working through Acts 12, this Sunday's message walks through Herod's persecution of the church, James being put to the sword, and Peter sleeping between two soldiers the night before his execution until an angel walks him out of prison. The central tension is why God lets James die yet delivers Peter — and the reminder that God doesn't enable us, He empowers us, asking us to do what we can while He handles what only He can. The call is to pray earnestly and with expectation, use the reason God gave us, and trust the God who sees the whole picture even when we only see earth.
item.itunes:summary: Working through Acts 12, this Sunday's message walks through Herod's persecution of the church, James being put to the sword, and Peter sleeping between two soldiers the night before his execution until an angel walks him out of prison. The central tension is why God lets James die yet delivers Peter — and the reminder that God doesn't enable us, He empowers us, asking us to do what we can while He handles what only He can. The call is to pray earnestly and with expectation, use the reason God gave us, and trust the God who sees the whole picture even when we only see earth.

item.title: Acts 10 - The River Church | Post Falls, Idaho
item.description: This sermon explores how God prepares hearts before we even have a chance to speak, using Cornelius as an example. It emphasizes that prayer and generosity are noticed by God, regardless of one's background or status.
item.itunes:summary: This sermon explores how God prepares hearts before we even have a chance to speak, using Cornelius as an example. It emphasizes that prayer and generosity are noticed by God, regardless of one's background or status.

item.title: Acts 9
item.description: This sermon explores the dramatic transformation of Saul, a zealous persecutor of Christians, into Paul, an apostle for Christ. It highlights how God uses divine interruptions to reach self-righteous individuals and calls believers to walk in compassion rather than pride.
item.itunes:summary: This sermon explores the dramatic transformation of Saul, a zealous persecutor of Christians, into Paul, an apostle for Christ. It highlights how God uses divine interruptions to reach self-righteous individuals and calls believers to walk in compassion rather than pride.

item.title: Philip in Samaria — Acts 8
item.description: The sermon explores the spread of Christianity from Jerusalem to Samaria, highlighting Philip's role as a lay person spreading the gospel despite persecution. It emphasizes that God uses ordinary people like Philip and C.S. Lewis to bring about transformation.
item.itunes:summary: The sermon explores the spread of Christianity from Jerusalem to Samaria, highlighting Philip's role as a lay person spreading the gospel despite persecution. It emphasizes that God uses ordinary people like Philip and C.S. Lewis to bring about transformation.

item.title: From Serving Tables to Standing Tall - Acts 6-7
item.description: The sermon explores the tension between serving practical needs and fulfilling spiritual duties in early Christian communities. It emphasizes the importance of prioritizing prayer, study, and preaching while also addressing the overlooked members of the congregation.
item.itunes:summary: The sermon explores the tension between serving practical needs and fulfilling spiritual duties in early Christian communities. It emphasizes the importance of prioritizing prayer, study, and preaching while also addressing the overlooked members of the congregation.

item.title: God's Call to Move Forward — Deuteronomy 1
item.description: The sermon explores the Israelites' long journey from slavery in Egypt to their promised land, emphasizing God's call for them to move forward despite fear and hesitation. The speaker encourages listeners to trust God’s timing and step into new opportunities.
item.itunes:summary: The sermon explores the Israelites' long journey from slavery in Egypt to their promised land, emphasizing God's call for them to move forward despite fear and hesitation. The speaker encourages listeners to trust God’s timing and step into new opportunities.

item.description: How do you get abundant life?

item.title: Judges Part 5
item.description: Continuing in Judges…
item.itunes:summary: Continuing in Judges…

item.title: Judges Part 4
item.description:
Getting back into Judges…
We often ask God for relief, but God knows that relief without repentance only leads back to bondage. Before God defeated the Midianites, He had to defeat the "enemy of the heart" in Gideon by tearing down the altars in his own household.
item.itunes:summary:
Getting back into Judges…
We often ask God for relief, but God knows that relief without repentance only leads back to bondage. Before God defeated the Midianites, He had to defeat the "enemy of the heart" in Gideon by tearing down the altars in his own household.

item.title: Light of the World 3
item.description:
Continuing in the Christmas season in 2025
Isaiah 7:14; 9:2, 6, Matthew 1:18-25, Luke 1:26-38; 9:23, John 1:46
item.itunes:summary:
Continuing in the Christmas season in 2025
Isaiah 7:14; 9:2, 6, Matthew 1:18-25, Luke 1:26-38; 9:23, John 1:46

* Genesis 49:10
* Luke 3, 4:16-21
* Matthew 1:1-17
* 1 Chronicles 17:11-14
* Acts 13:22
* Leviticus 25:8-13
* Isaiah 61:1-2
item.itunes:summary:
Continuing in the Christmas season in 2025
* Isaiah 9:2, 6-7
* Genesis 49:10
* Luke 3, 4:16-21
* Matthew 1:1-17
* 1 Chronicles 17:11-14

* Isaiah 61:1-2

item.title: Light of the World
item.description: Entering the Christmas season in 2025
item.itunes:summary: Entering the Christmas season in 2025

item.title: Cody Karst | Jonah
item.description: The Assyrians were vile, cruel, and everything Jonah despised. So he ran 2,500 miles away! The Book of Jonah shows us what happens when we let our prejudice, politics, or nationalism trump the heart of God for the lost.
item.itunes:summary: The Assyrians were vile, cruel, and everything Jonah despised. So he ran 2,500 miles away! The Book of Jonah shows us what happens when we let our prejudice, politics, or nationalism trump the heart of God for the lost.

item.title: The Cave is Not Your Address
item.description: “So many times… we withdraw from the the people, the community, from God, and we let that cave become our home."
item.itunes:summary: “So many times… we withdraw from the the people, the community, from God, and we let that cave become our home."

item.title: Overflow
item.description: Why Tithing Is a Privilege of Faith, Not a Legal Obligation
item.itunes:summary: Why Tithing Is a Privilege of Faith, Not a Legal Obligation

item.title: The Good Samaritan
item.description: Embrace your call to "go and do likewise" by asking the Holy Spirit to move you from just seeing to truly perceiving the needs of others. As you let that compassion lead you to sacrificial action, you will become a true neighbor and reflect the saving mercy that Jesus first extended to you.
item.itunes:summary: Embrace your call to "go and do likewise" by asking the Holy Spirit to move you from just seeing to truly perceiving the needs of others. As you let that compassion lead you to sacrificial action, you will become a true neighbor and reflect the saving mercy that Jesus first extended to you.

item.title: Joshua: Strong and Courageous 3
item.description: By understanding that God doesn't take sides but comes to take over, you are called to surrender your words and your will to Him. Embrace this truth, and you will find your tongue transformed from a tool of doubt into a powerful instrument of faith!
item.itunes:summary: By understanding that God doesn't take sides but comes to take over, you are called to surrender your words and your will to Him. Embrace this truth, and you will find your tongue transformed from a tool of doubt into a powerful instrument of faith!

item.title: KICKOFF SUNDAY
item.description: Don't just be a spectator this year; actively participate in the great things God has in store for you. By intentionally stepping into the new season of ministry, you will be a part of God's work and experience His promises firsthand.
item.itunes:summary: Don't just be a spectator this year; actively participate in the great things God has in store for you. By intentionally stepping into the new season of ministry, you will be a part of God's work and experience His promises firsthand.

item.title: Joshua: Strong and Courageous 2
item.description: Don't let your past define you; embrace the truth that God can turn your darkest chapters into a beautiful redemption story. By accepting His forgiveness and purpose, you can move forward into the new covenant He has for you.
item.itunes:summary: Don't let your past define you; embrace the truth that God can turn your darkest chapters into a beautiful redemption story. By accepting His forgiveness and purpose, you can move forward into the new covenant He has for you.

item.title: Designed for Connection
item.description: The path of faith isn't meant to be walked alone. By intentionally linking arms with your church family and being vulnerable, you will find the strength, encouragement, and accountability needed to thrive in Christ.
item.itunes:summary: The path of faith isn't meant to be walked alone. By intentionally linking arms with your church family and being vulnerable, you will find the strength, encouragement, and accountability needed to thrive in Christ.

item.title: Stability in a Shifting World
item.description: Instead of being tossed by the chaos of life, anchor your soul to God's unchanging Word and find unshakable stability. By actively engaging with God's truth, you can withstand life's storms and find rest in the unwavering hope of Jesus Christ.
item.itunes:summary: Instead of being tossed by the chaos of life, anchor your soul to God's unchanging Word and find unshakable stability. By actively engaging with God's truth, you can withstand life's storms and find rest in the unwavering hope of Jesus Christ.

item.title: Caleb and a Generation of Grasshoppers
item.description: Step out in faith and courage, just like Caleb, to claim the spiritual territory God has destined for you, knowing that the greatest fruit for His Kingdom is found where you're willing to go. Embrace an offensive heart, not a defensive one, and watch God work miraculously through your obedience to impact the lost and shine His light in enemy territory.
item.itunes:summary: Step out in faith and courage, just like Caleb, to claim the spiritual territory God has destined for you, knowing that the greatest fruit for His Kingdom is found where you're willing to go. Embrace an offensive heart, not a defensive one, and watch God work miraculously through your obedience to impact the lost and shine His light in enemy territory.

item.title: What's Your Purpose?
item.description: Everyone has a unique purpose from God, and we need to discover and live out that divine calling regardless of our circumstances or perceived influence. Knowing God and serving Him leads to a fulfilling life, impacting not only in our own lives, but also in our communities and the world!
item.itunes:summary: Everyone has a unique purpose from God, and we need to discover and live out that divine calling regardless of our circumstances or perceived influence. Knowing God and serving Him leads to a fulfilling life, impacting not only in our own lives, but also in our communities and the world!

item.title: The Anger Epidemic: Learning from Moses
item.description: This week we explore Moses's lifelong struggle with anger, demonstrating how his unchecked rage, from killing an Egyptian to breaking the stone tablets, kept him from the Promised Land. We’ll contrast Moses's ungodly anger with God's righteous anger…
item.itunes:summary: This week we explore Moses's lifelong struggle with anger, demonstrating how his unchecked rage, from killing an Egyptian to breaking the stone tablets, kept him from the Promised Land. We’ll contrast Moses's ungodly anger with God's righteous anger…

item.title: The Silent Thief of Joy
item.description: This sermon delves into the insidious nature of envy, a "silent thief" that robs us of joy and peace, manifesting as bitterness, criticism, and division. Discover why this particular sin offers no temporary pleasure and how it can lead to hellish consequences. Most importantly, learn the powerful solutions found in the Gospel!
item.itunes:summary: This sermon delves into the insidious nature of envy, a "silent thief" that robs us of joy and peace, manifesting as bitterness, criticism, and division. Discover why this particular sin offers no temporary pleasure and how it can lead to hellish consequences. Most importantly, learn the powerful solutions found in the Gospel!

item.title: Exodus 19
item.description: In this sermon from Exodus 19, discover that while serving God can be difficult, the true reward isn't found in accomplishments or fulfilling a calling, but in the intimate relationship and presence of God Himself. Just as Moses ascended the mountain to meet God, and as the curtain in the temple was torn, we are invited into a deep, satisfying fellowship with Jesus that makes every challenge worth it.
item.itunes:summary: In this sermon from Exodus 19, discover that while serving God can be difficult, the true reward isn't found in accomplishments or fulfilling a calling, but in the intimate relationship and presence of God Himself. Just as Moses ascended the mountain to meet God, and as the curtain in the temple was torn, we are invited into a deep, satisfying fellowship with Jesus that makes every challenge worth it.

item.title: Warning Lights
item.description: Ever feel like something's "off" in your life, but you can't quite put your finger on it? In this sermon, we explore how to recognize the spiritual warning signs in our lives and, more importantly, how God's Word serves as our ultimate diagnostic tool and repair manual. Learn why ignoring these spiritual "check engine lights" can lead to greater problems, and discover the transformative power of consistently engaging with the Bible.
item.itunes:summary: Ever feel like something's "off" in your life, but you can't quite put your finger on it? In this sermon, we explore how to recognize the spiritual warning signs in our lives and, more importantly, how God's Word serves as our ultimate diagnostic tool and repair manual. Learn why ignoring these spiritual "check engine lights" can lead to greater problems, and discover the transformative power of consistently engaging with the Bible.

item.title: Mother’s Day
item.description:
Ladies, you have the ear of God and the sight of God, and He loves you dearly. Men, you have a charge to care for the women in your life following after the example that Jesus gave!
Genesis 16, John 2:4-11
item.itunes:summary:

item.title: Covenant Keeping
item.description: We continue our series on How to Have a Totally Awesome Marriage!
item.itunes:summary: We continue our series on How to Have a Totally Awesome Marriage!

item.title: Devil Stomping
item.description: We continue our series on How to Have a Totally Awesome Marriage!
item.itunes:summary: We continue our series on How to Have a Totally Awesome Marriage!

item.title: Mission Unified
item.description: We continue our series on How to Have a Totally Awesome Marriage! We need to be unified in our mission together! Genesis 1:28, 2:18, Genesis 3:1-7, Amos 3:3, Mark 16:14-18
item.itunes:summary: We continue our series on How to Have a Totally Awesome Marriage! We need to be unified in our mission together! Genesis 1:28, 2:18, Genesis 3:1-7, Amos 3:3, Mark 16:14-18

item.title: Jesus Centered
item.description: We begin our new series on How to Have a Totally Awesome Marriage! Make Jesus the center of your marriage and it will not be easily broken! Genesis 2:4, Ecclesiastes 4:9-12
item.itunes:summary: We begin our new series on How to Have a Totally Awesome Marriage! Make Jesus the center of your marriage and it will not be easily broken! Genesis 2:4, Ecclesiastes 4:9-12

item.title: Sabbath Rest
item.description: God created the Sabbath for your benefit, not just a ritual to be observed… Trust God with everything you have and take a day off! Genesis 2, Mark 2:23-28, Exodus 31:14
item.itunes:summary: God created the Sabbath for your benefit, not just a ritual to be observed… Trust God with everything you have and take a day off! Genesis 2, Mark 2:23-28, Exodus 31:14

item.description: Join us for service at The River Church in Beautiful Post Falls, Idaho!

item.description: Join us for service at The River Church in Beautiful Post Falls, Idaho!

item.description: Join us for service at The River Church in Beautiful Post Falls, Idaho!

item.title: Elementary: Baptisms
item.description: Join us as we learn this week about the foundation truth of Baptisms.
item.itunes:summary: Join us as we learn this week about the foundation truth of Baptisms.

item.title: Elementary: Eternal Judgement
item.description: Join us as Pastor Steve teaches us about how all of us will face a Judgment day.
item.itunes:summary: Join us as Pastor Steve teaches us about how all of us will face a Judgment day.

item.title: Elementary: Resurrection of the Dead
item.description: Join us as we learn about the resurrection of Jesus and how we will experience a resurrection also.
item.itunes:summary: Join us as we learn about the resurrection of Jesus and how we will experience a resurrection also.

item.title: Elementary: Laying On of Hands
item.description: Join us as we learn about the significance of laying on of hands in scripture and how that helps us to have continuity from one generation to the next.
item.itunes:summary: Join us as we learn about the significance of laying on of hands in scripture and how that helps us to have continuity from one generation to the next.

item.title: Elementary: Faith
item.description: Join us as Pastor Steve teaches us about elementary faith and how we should continually take steps of faith.
item.itunes:summary: Join us as Pastor Steve teaches us about elementary faith and how we should continually take steps of faith.

item.title: Elementary: Repentance
item.description: This week Pastor Steve teaches us that repentance is required. Listen in as we learn that God is requiring us to turn away from our sins and walk towards him.
item.itunes:summary: This week Pastor Steve teaches us that repentance is required. Listen in as we learn that God is requiring us to turn away from our sins and walk towards him.

item.title: The Bitter End to Bitterness
item.description: In this podcast, Pastor Cody Karst teaches us that bitterness always has a bitter end and how to overcome the things that have caused us to be bitter in our lives.
item.itunes:summary: In this podcast, Pastor Cody Karst teaches us that bitterness always has a bitter end and how to overcome the things that have caused us to be bitter in our lives.

item.title: El Roi
item.description: Pastor Steve wraps up our What's in a Name series with the name El Roi. Join us as Pastor Steve teaches about how valuable you are to God.
item.itunes:summary: Pastor Steve wraps up our What's in a Name series with the name El Roi. Join us as Pastor Steve teaches about how valuable you are to God.

item.title: Jehovah Nissi
item.description: This Sunday Pastor Steve taught us that we all have an important part in lifting the banner of Jesus. Please subscribe to the River Church podcast!
item.itunes:summary: This Sunday Pastor Steve taught us that we all have an important part in lifting the banner of Jesus. Please subscribe to the River Church podcast!

item.title: Redemption
item.description: This Sunday Pastor Steve taught us about the redemption that Jesus offers to all of us. Please listen to this life-changing message.
item.itunes:summary: This Sunday Pastor Steve taught us about the redemption that Jesus offers to all of us. Please listen to this life-changing message.

item.title: Jehovah Go’El
item.description: Pastor Tracey Karst teaches us the name of God that means redemption and how that can impact your life. Her message will inspire and encourage you!
item.itunes:summary: Pastor Tracey Karst teaches us the name of God that means redemption and how that can impact your life. Her message will inspire and encourage you!

item.title: Jehovah Rapha
item.description: This Sunday Pastor Steve Karst taught us about the name Jehovah Rapha and how God is our healer. Join us and hear about how God can turn any bitter circumstance that we are in around for our benefit.
item.itunes:summary: This Sunday Pastor Steve Karst taught us about the name Jehovah Rapha and how God is our healer. Join us and hear about how God can turn any bitter circumstance that we are in around for our benefit.

item.title: Jehovah Jireh
item.description: Pastor Steven Karst teaches about the name of God Jehovah Jireh in Genesis 22. We hope this message blesses you and inspires you to live your life for Jesus.
item.itunes:summary: Pastor Steven Karst teaches about the name of God Jehovah Jireh in Genesis 22. We hope this message blesses you and inspires you to live your life for Jesus.

item.title: Jehovah Shalom
item.description: Are you looking for peace in your soul in the midst of this crazy and chaotic world? Listen in as Pastor Steven Karst teaches us about how God is the God of peace. We hope this message is inspiring and helps you to overcome the anxiety and fear in your life.
item.itunes:summary: Are you looking for peace in your soul in the midst of this crazy and chaotic world? Listen in as Pastor Steven Karst teaches us about how God is the God of peace. We hope this message is inspiring and helps you to overcome the anxiety and fear in your life.

item.title: Church Vision
item.description: Join us as Pastor Steven Karst explains why vision is important to the Church and how we often lose our passion for the vision God has given us. He will also explain the vision that God has given The River Church for the coming year.
item.itunes:summary: Join us as Pastor Steven Karst explains why vision is important to the Church and how we often lose our passion for the vision God has given us. He will also explain the vision that God has given The River Church for the coming year.

item.title: Elohim
item.description: Join us for the kickoff of our new series about the names of God found in Scripture. This week you will learn about the Hebrew word Elohim. We hope you will join us and subscribe to our weekly podcast.
item.itunes:summary: Join us for the kickoff of our new series about the names of God found in Scripture. This week you will learn about the Hebrew word Elohim. We hope you will join us and subscribe to our weekly podcast.
